title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.11.21 - Rewrote the Swap keyword tooltip to be shorter and clearer: give/take on separate lines with a shared cap, and colored the number and 'swappable' to match base-game keyword styling.
